title_guess: Bath weekend camping with David (Marina Campsite, Roman Baths)

pages.text:
Sunday 29th August.
        9.45. we set off, Simon, Eve, John, Charles, Melody 14 & Charlotte 13, to __Bath__ to Camp with David. We arrived & found their van at the Marina Campsite [illegible] but they had gone out. The 4 children played 4 in a Row & chess at the table, while Simon & Eve went out for a walk by the river. When we got back Eve had to yell "John, John Kirby!" several times before Charles came & let us in. Everyone was laughing.
        We had a very slow start to lunch with extremely strong cider provided by David & just as we started to carve the chicken at 2 pm the heavens opened with 2 heavy rain showers. We left the food under a parasol & sheltered in the vans. Finally we got fed.
        Soon after, at [?3].45. (!) we set off walking into Bath. Charles had hurt his back falling off the swing in the playground.

captions: Gorgon's head. Romano Celtic Head from Pediment of the Temple of Sulis Minerva, Roman Baths, Bath.
